title: Meeting note summary
prompt:
Summarize the meeting note below in exactly three bullet points for an internal project update. Use only the information provided.

Meeting note: The client requested a revised onboarding checklist. Alex will send a draft by Friday. Legal review is still pending. No launch date has been confirmed.

title: Action item extraction
prompt:
Extract action items from the note below into valid JSON with exactly these keys: task, owner, deadline, status. Use null when missing.

Note: Alex will send the onboarding draft by Friday. Legal review remains pending. The launch date is still unconfirmed.
human_checks: No invented deadline for legal review unless clearly tied

title: Follow-up email drafting
prompt:
Draft a short follow-up email based only on the project update below. Do not invent commitments.

Project update: The revised checklist is in progress. Alex plans to send a draft by Friday. Legal review is still pending.
expected_behavior: Email remains grounded in provided update
Does not promise approval or completion not stated

title: Customer account brief
prompt:
Create a short account brief from the CRM note below. Include current risk and next step, using only the provided information.

CRM note: Beacon Labs reported onboarding delays. The account owner plans to schedule a check-in next week. Renewal timing was not discussed.

title: Source-bounded internal Q&A
prompt:
Answer the question using only the memo below. If the answer is not stated, say "not stated."

Question: Who approved the final budget?

Memo: Finance requested a revised estimate. No updated number has been approved yet. Mia is coordinating vendor outreach.
expected_behavior: Responds that approval is not stated or clearly not approved
